title: Dataset of single-cell transcriptomic matrix of 10 human glioblastoma tissue
author: Li, Yuzhe
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Dataset of single-cell transcriptomic matrix of 10 human glioblastoma tissue.  scRNA-seq was performed using the droplet-based 10x Genomics platform     (10x Genomics, Pleasanton, CA, USA) .  GBM tissues for single-cell RNA sequencing (  scRNA-seq)  were collected from patients admitted to Xiangya Hospital, Central South University.
steps_raw: Dataset of single-cell transcriptomic matrix of 10 human glioblastoma tissue.  scRNA-seq was performed using the droplet-based 10x Genomics platform     (10x Genomics, Pleasanton, CA, USA) .  GBM tissues for single-cell RNA sequencing (  scRNA-seq)  were collected from patients admitted to Xiangya Hospital, Central South University.
